metadata:

source: "./A1-QandA.txt"

text: "You can use it after assignment 1 as would have an appreciation of the issues then. If you use any of these now, you will get nothing for the code.\n\n\nQ:\nQuestion related to how to print the output kWh per sq m for option 3.\n\nA:\nUse either kWh/m^2 or kWh/m2.\n\nThe preferred version is kWh/m^2 as that is more clear but will accept either one.\n\n\nQ:\nI was curious in assignment 1 am I able to use enums?\n\n\nA:\nYes, of course you are. It is part of the language and is part of the topic readings. Only the stuff that has been explicitly excluded are the ones you can't use. \n\nRelated question about can't be used is also below."
